mechanics.excerpt: SKILLS skill bonuses_ successful Perception Check will reveal details that might otherwise go unnoticed: Perception Skill is often used for such tasks as conducting search and eavesdropping This skill useful variety of circumstances_ The gamemaster can use Perception Checks to determine who sees an approaching enemy first find out MechWarrior notices that someone has tampered with the circuitry in his cockpit.
